---
title: "Ratio check report"
author: "Proteomics and Proteostasis Lab"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d/%m/%y')`"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
params:
  data:
    label: "Upload data matrix file:"
    input: file
    value: NULL
  anno:
    label: "Upload annotation file:"
    input: file
    value: NULL
  volume:
    label: "Volume:"
    input: numeric
    value: 30
  tmt:
    label: "TMT"
    input: text
    value: "tmtpro"
  tmtextra:
    label: "LysN extra labeling"
    value: FALSE
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      fig.align = "center")

# Ensure tmt is always a single non-null string
tmt_type <- if (!is.null(params$tmt) && length(params$tmt) == 1) {
  as.character(params$tmt)
} else {
  "tmtpro"
}

is_tmt     <- tmt_type != "tmtzero"
is_tmtzero <- tmt_type == "tmtzero"

# Show modified peptides section for any TMT variant (including tmtzero)
show_modifications <- is_tmt || is_tmtzero
```

```{r}
# Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
# Load PSM data (always required)
df_psm <- readr::read_delim(params$data,
                            delim = "\t",
                            escape_double = FALSE,
                            trim_ws = TRUE) %>%
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  dplyr::rename_with(~ gsub("intensity_", "", .x),
                     starts_with("intensity_")) %>%
  dplyr::select(!dplyr::starts_with("na_"))

# tmt_regex is needed for any TMT variant including tmtzero
if (show_modifications) {

  tmt_regex <- if (tmt_type == "tmtpro") {
    "K\\(304\\.2072\\)"
  } else if (tmt_type == "tmt") {
    "K\\(229\\.16293\\)"
  } else {
    "K\\(295\\.1896\\)"
  }

  if (isTRUE(params$tmtextra)) {
    foo  <- gsub("\\\\.", "\\.", stringr::str_extract(tmt_regex, "[0-9]+\\\\.[0-9]+"))
    tmt2 <- round(as.numeric(foo) * 2, 3)
    tmt2 <- paste0("K\\(", gsub("\\.", "\\\\.", tmt2))
  }

}

# anno_psm is only needed for Ratio check and Volume sections (not tmtzero)
if (is_tmt) {

  anno_psm <- readr::read_table(params$anno, col_names = FALSE) %>%
    rename(channel = X1, key = X2) %>%
    filter(!is.na(key)) %>%
    mutate(key = janitor::make_clean_names(key))

}
```

### Overall information

```{r}
total_peptides <- nrow(df_psm)
unique_peptides <- df_psm %>% distinct(peptide) %>% nrow()
total_protein   <- length(unique(df_psm$protein_id))

t(data.frame(total_peptides, unique_peptides, total_protein)) %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_paper("hover", full_width = F, font_size = 19)
```

<br>

```{r fig.height=6, fig.width=10}
m_cle <- df_psm %>%
  select(number_of_missed_cleavages) %>%
  mutate(number_of_missed_cleavages = as.factor(number_of_missed_cleavages)) %>%
  group_by(number_of_missed_cleavages) %>%
  count() %>%
  ggplot(aes(number_of_missed_cleavages, n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "darkolivegreen", alpha = .6, color = "grey20") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03, 0.1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n, " - ", round(n / nrow(df_psm) * 100, 2), "%")),
            vjust = -.2) +
  labs(x = "# of missed cleavages", y = "# of PSMs (%)",
       title = "Distribution of missed cleavages")

charge <- df_psm %>%
  select(charge) %>%
  mutate(charge = as.factor(charge)) %>%
  group_by(charge) %>%
  count() %>%
  ggplot(aes(charge, n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "skyblue", alpha = .6, color = "grey20") +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.03, 0.1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n, " - ", round(n / nrow(df_psm) * 100, 2), "%")),
            vjust = -.2) +
  labs(x = "Charge (z)", y = "# of PSMs (%)",
       title = "Distribution of charge")

ggpubr::ggarrange(m_cle, charge, ncol = 2)
```

<br>

```{r}
df_psm %>%
  mutate(retention = retention / 60) %>%
  ggplot(aes(retention, intensity)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkblue") +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Retention time (minutes)",
       y = "Intensity",
       title = "Base peak chromatogram") +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0.1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 140, 20))
```

```{r eval=show_modifications, results='asis'}
cat("### Percentage of modified peptides")
```

```{r eval=show_modifications}
df_label <- df_psm %>%
  select(peptide, assigned_modifications) %>%
  summarise(
    has_M           = sum(grepl("M", peptide)),
    has_K           = sum(grepl("K", peptide)),
    is_M            = sum(grepl("15.9949", assigned_modifications)),
    is_K_tmt        = sum(grepl(tmt_regex, assigned_modifications)),
    is_nterm_tmt    = sum(grepl("N-term", assigned_modifications)),
    potential_nterm = n()
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    perc_M         = round(is_M / has_M * 100, 2),
    perc_K_tmt     = round(is_K_tmt / has_K * 100, 2),
    perc_nterm_tmt = round(is_nterm_tmt / potential_nterm * 100, 2)
  ) %>%
  select(starts_with("perc"))

if (exists("tmt2")) {
  df_tmt2 <- df_psm %>%
    select(peptide, assigned_modifications) %>%
    summarise(
      has_K     = sum(grepl("K", peptide)),
      is_K_tmt2 = sum(grepl(tmt2, assigned_modifications))
    ) %>%
    mutate(perc_K_tmt2 = round(is_K_tmt2 / has_K * 100, 2)) %>%
    select(starts_with("perc"))

  df_label <- cbind(df_label, df_tmt2)
}

df_label %>%
  t() %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_paper("hover", full_width = F, font_size = 19)
```

```{r eval=is_tmt, results='asis'}
cat("### Ratio check")
```

```{r eval=is_tmt}
df_ratio_psm <- df_psm %>%
  select(peptide,
         any_of(anno_psm$key)) %>%
  pivot_longer(!peptide, names_to = "key", values_to = "vals") %>%
  left_join(anno_psm, by = "key") %>%
  group_by(channel) %>%
  summarise(sum = sum(vals)) %>%
  mutate(ratio    = sum / max(sum),
         pq_ratio = max(sum) / sum,
         channel  = factor(channel,
                           levels = anno_psm$channel))

df_ratio_psm %>%
  left_join(anno_psm, by = "channel") %>%
  rename(sample = key) %>%
  mutate(ratio    = round(ratio, 2),
         pq_ratio = round(pq_ratio, 2)) %>%
  select(-sum) %>%
  relocate(sample, .before = 1) %>%
  arrange(factor(channel, levels = anno_psm$channel)) %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_paper("hover", full_width = F, font_size = 19)
```

<br>

```{r eval=is_tmt}
df_ratio_psm %>%
  ggplot(aes(channel, ratio, fill = channel)) +
  geom_col(color = "grey20", alpha = .5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = rainbow(nrow(anno_psm))) +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(ratio, 3)),
            angle = 90,
            hjust = 1.5) +
  labs(x = "Channel",
       y = "Ratio") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

```{r eval=is_tmt, results='asis'}
cat("### Volume\n\nVolumes (uL) per sample:")
```

```{r eval=is_tmt}
df_volume <- df_ratio_psm %>%
  mutate(volume = round(params$volume * pq_ratio / max(pq_ratio), 1)) %>%
  left_join(anno_psm, by = "channel") %>%
  rename(sample = key) %>%
  select(sample, channel, volume) %>%
  arrange(factor(channel, levels = anno_psm$channel)) %>%
  janitor::adorn_totals("row", fill = "Total volume")

df_volume %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_paper("hover", full_width = F, font_size = 19) %>%
  column_spec(3, background = "lightblue") %>%
  row_spec(nrow(df_volume), background = "salmon")
```

<br>

```{r eval=is_tmt, results='asis'}
cat("To go from 26.6% to a 3% of ACN, the following volume (uL) of 5% formic acid has to be added to the total volume:")
```

```{r eval=is_tmt}
df_ratio_psm %>%
  mutate(vol = params$volume * pq_ratio / max(pq_ratio)) %>%
  summarise(sum_vol = sum(vol)) %>%
  mutate(vol_fa = round(26.6 * sum_vol / 3, 2)) %>%
  select(vol_fa) %>%
  t() %>%
  kbl() %>%
  kable_paper("hover", full_width = F, font_size = 19) %>%
  row_spec(1, bold = T, color = "white", background = "#D7261E")
```

<hr>

<footer style="font-size: 0.75em; color: #555;">

<p><strong>For improvements, suggestions, optimizations, and inquiries, contact:</strong></p>

<p style="text-indent: 2em;">
Patricia Martínez — <a href="mailto:patricia.martinez@ispasturias.es">patricia.martinez\@ispasturias.es</a>
</p>

<p style="text-indent: 2em;">
Sergio Carrascal — <a href="mailto:sergio.carrascal@ispasturias.es">sergio.carrascal\@ispasturias.es</a>
</p>

</footer>
